design_philosophy: Modern Glam / Regal Elegance. A sophisticated blend of deepest navy foundations, rich moody jewel tones (Emerald, Maroon), and high-contrast editorial typography. Avoids typical government/utility app aesthetics by prioritizing craftsmanship, generous whitespace, and tactile materials (satin, glass, subtle gold borders).

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-[#F5F2EA]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. 2-3x more spacing than standard SaaS. Internal padding on bordered containers must be p-6 or p-8.

surfaces_and_materials.solid_card: bg-[#131B2F] border border-[#D4AF37]/15 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/40 transition-colors duration-300

components_instructions.buttons: Use flat, sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary button should be solid Gold (#D4AF37) with Navy text. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and increased brightness. Include data-testid.
components_instructions.search_bar: Massive, editorial presence. Glassmorphism background, tall height (h-16), large serif text input, prominent gold search icon. Left aligned text. Requires data-testid.
components_instructions.badges: Confidence Indicators: 'Verified' uses Deep Emerald bg + Green text + Gold tick. 'Partially Verified' uses Amber bg. 'Unverified' uses Deep Maroon bg + Pale Red text. Use subtle glowing drop-shadows on badges.
components_instructions.checklists: Shadcn Checkbox. Override default blue focus rings with Gold focus rings (focus:ring-[#D4AF37]). Ensure large hit areas (p-4 per checklist item) and strikethrough animation for checked items.
components_instructions.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphic header (z-50). Visible nav links on desktop (Outfit font, uppercase, wide tracking). Gold 'Login with Google' CTA button.
components_instructions.process_cards: Bento grid mode. Mix tall and wide cards. Hover effects should illuminate the border (tracing beam effect or just border color shift). No generic Bootstrap columns.
components_instructions.shadcn_customization: Ensure all Shadcn components (dialogs, menus) use the defined dark jewel colors and gold accents. Use .js extensions, not .tsx. Avoid generic Vercel look.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Slow, deliberate transitions: 'transition-all duration-300 ease-out'.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for search results and process steps.

hero_background.description: Rich dark crumpled satin fabric, providing a highly textured, luxurious, and non-distracting background for the hero section.

regal_texture.description: Dark textured plaster wall for alternate section backgrounds.

indian_architecture_accent.description: Traditional domed roof building in India, to be used sparingly as a faint background image in category cards or about section, with heavy dark overlay.

icons.style: Duotone or thin weight, to match the elegant serif typography.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="search-input"', 'data-testid="state-selector"', 'data-testid="login-button"', 'data-testid="checklist-item"').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure gold text on navy background meets APCA 3:1 for large text and 4.5:1 for body. Apply explicit focus rings.
